case_title: IN RE: JUAN CARLOS BECERRA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MARTINEZ, JUAN CARLOS BECERRA HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER MARTINEZ, JUAN CARLOS BECERRA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2003, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITION FOR GENDER CHANGE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COMMISSIONER: SUE KAPLAN, CLERKS: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA/M. VALLEJO, CSR: BRENDA FIELDS.
DECREE CHANGING NAME GRANTED, NAME IS CHANGED TO: DAISY BECERRA. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GENDER CHANGE-ONLY FILED BY PETITIONER MARTINEZ, JUAN CARLOS BECERRA

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantaprich/M. Vallejo, CSR. Brenda Fields.
Petitioner, Juan Carlos Becerra Martinez present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for Name Change Only.
Gender Change is Denied Without prejudice, not completed, requires a declaration by a MD.
Name is changed to: Daisy Becerra.
Decree signed in open court.
